title: Realtime guide with operational and developer coverage
description:
## Intent
As a developer or operator, I want a single authoritative guide to configure, run, and troubleshoot realtime gossip and overlay behavior across UDS and MQTT.

## Gherkin
Feature: Realtime documentation
  Scenario: Realtime guide is complete
    Given a user reads docs/REALTIME.md
    Then it documents transport selection, broker discovery, and autostart behavior
    And it documents envelope schema and dedupe rules
    And it documents overlay merge rules and GC
    And it documents example CLI commands and config blocks

## Definition of Done
- docs/REALTIME.md includes quickstart, architecture overview, CLI reference tables, config examples, dedupe and loop protection, overlay semantics, GC and hooks, troubleshooting, and AWS IoT Core outline.
- Document explicit policy exception for discovery precedence.
creator: ryan.porter
